description: Create a bow-tie risk analysis diagram and a risk matrix based on the report provided in '~/Desktop/risk_assessment_report.txt'. On the first page, construct a bow-tie diagram featuring a central 'Top Event' (Orange), 5 Threats (Red), 5 Prevention Barriers (Blue), 5 Consequences (Dark Red), and 5 Mitigation Barriers (Green). Use arrows to indicate the flow from Threat to Prevention to Top Event to Mitigation to Consequence, labeling all shapes with text from the report. On the second page, create a 5x5 Risk Matrix plotting the 5 risks on a Likelihood vs Severity grid with cell coloring (Green/Yellow/Orange/Red) as specified in the report. Save the diagram to '~/Diagrams/bowtie_hydrocarbon_release.drawio' and export it as a PDF to '~/Diagrams/bowtie_hydrocarbon_release.pdf'.
